trigger_reason: step 13 FIRED for R770 (top-3 proximity in v12 E31); step 13.5 v11 adversarial attack triggered.

step_13_spec_pre_check_input.rationale: Tropical attention is algorithmically distinct from softmax/linear/LSH attention (different algebraic structure entirely). Min-plus attention can produce extremely sparse attention patterns by design (dominated by min over keys per query). Expected: distinguishable attention patterns and likely-distinguishable downstream accuracy.

attacks.claim: Min-plus algebra attention reduces to softmax in low-temperature limit
attacks.evidence: For high softmax inverse temperature, softmax → argmax which is similar to min over negated
attacks.rebuttal: Tropical attention is min over add (algebraic semiring), not argmax over normalized; the algebraic structure is genuinely different (commutative semiring vs probability simplex)

attacks.claim: LRA accuracy may not discriminate between attention algorithms at the chosen scale
attacks.evidence: LRA has high noise across seeds (~3 points accuracy)
attacks.rebuttal: LRA Pathfinder has 4-7 point gap between best and worst attention variants per Tay 2020

attacks.claim: Reformer LSH is not the SOTA sub-quadratic baseline for LRA
attacks.evidence: Performer or Linformer may be stronger
attacks.rebuttal: B_control is Performer/Linformer; C_baseline is Reformer; the spec includes the correct strong baselines

rationale: R770 tropical (min-plus) attention is algorithmically distinct from softmax/linear/LSH attention. Attacks A1-A3 attempt to demolish distinguishability but all fail at load-bearing level. A4 (under-power) succeeded but not load-bearing. Post-attack verdict: TRUE (architectural distinguishability preserved).
v12_observation: R770 passed step 05.5 (architectural-topology change); step 13.5 attack success rate is LOWER than v11 baseline for this round (load_bearing_succeeded=false). This is consistent with v12 prediction: architectural candidates have different load-bearing weakness profile from R279-pattern candidates.
